steps.t: Sterling Proudfoot is in Buckland, west of Bree and east of the Brandywine River. You should bring the hide and furs to Sterling Proudfoot.

Sterling Proudfoot is in Buckland, west of Bree and east of the Brandywine River. You should bring the last set of components to Sterling Proudfoot.
